alignments.json_text: Hey, Matt. Looks good for tomorrow night, man. Everybody's psyched. I got everything lined up. I just figure I need about ten bucks from everyone to cover what I'm out.
alignments.wiki_text: Hey, Matt! Looks good for tomorrow night, man. Everybody's psyched. I got everything lined up. I just figure I-- I need about 10 bucks from everyone to cover what I'm out--

alignments.json_text: Listen, Steve. Forget it. You can't use my room and I don't want your stuff.

alignments.json_text: What? Hey, wait a minute, man. You're going to ruin everything I lined up.

alignments.json_text: Come on, Matt. Steve, listen to me very carefully. I'm not going to drink and I'm not going to smoke pot. Period.
